title: ⛽️ Welcome to the "energy superpower" In Sevastopol, they decided to...
title_en: ⛽️ Welcome to the "energy superpower" In Sevastopol, they decided to...
title_uk: ⛽️ Ласкаво просимо до «енергетичної супердержави» У Севастополі вирішили...
description: ⛽️ Welcome to the "energy superpower" In Sevastopol, they decided to dispense gasoline by QR codes: no more than 20 liters per week per car. You can refuel only during the day, at special gas stations and only after the approval of the "controller". The funniest thing is that the QR codes for today ended literally a couple of hours after the system was launched. We are waiting for news about the lottery for the right to buy another 10 liters 🤡
description_en: ⛽️ Welcome to the "energy superpower" In Sevastopol, they decided to dispense gasoline by QR codes: no more than 20 liters per week per car. You can refuel only during the day, at special gas stations and only after the approval of the "controller". The funniest thing is that the QR codes for today ended literally a couple of hours after the system was launched. We are waiting for news about the lottery for the right to buy another 10 liters 🤡
description_uk: ⛽️ Добро пожаловать в «энергетическую сверхдержаву» В Севастополе бензин решили выдавать по QR-кодам: не более 20 литров в неделю на одну машину. Заправиться можно только днем, на специальных АЗС и только после одобрения «контролера». Самое смешное, что QR-коды на сегодня закончились буквально через пару часов после запуска системы. Ждем новости о лотереи на право купить еще 10 литров 🤡

title: Kyiv: Drone strike

description: Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga strongly condemned the Russian attack on the Centralized Storage of Spent Nuclear Fuel in the Chernobyl zone. title: Strike confirmed on residential building
description: Russian terrorists hit a spent nuclear fuel storage facility with a drone, the Energoatom BpLA hit the building of the centralized storage facility. As a result, the container reception area was partially destroyed. Fortunately, no nuclear fuel was stored there at the time of the impact. The radiation background is within the norm.
description_en: Russian terrorists hit a spent nuclear fuel storage facility with a drone, the Energoatom BpLA hit the building of the centralized storage facility. As a result, the container reception area was partially destroyed. Fortunately, no nuclear fuel was stored there at the time of the impact. The radiation background is within the norm.
description_uk: руснявые террористы ударили дроном по объекту хранения отработанного ядерного топлива, — Энергоатом БпЛА попал в здание централизованного хранилища. В результате частично разрушено помещение приема контейнеров. К счастью, в момент удара ядерное топливо там не хранилось. Радиационный фон — в пределах нормы.

description: 🫠 Poland demanded that Ukraine revise the name of the SSO unit in honor of the UPA Polish Defense Minister Władysław Kosyniak-Kamysh discussed this issue with Kirill Budanov during a meeting in Warsaw. According to him, Poland remains a partner of Ukraine in security matters, however, it is awaiting a review of the decision to award one of the subdivisions of the SSO with the honorific name "names of Heroes of the UPA"....
description_en: 🫠 Poland demanded that Ukraine revise the name of the SSO unit in honor of the UPA Polish Defense Minister Władysław Kosyniak-Kamysh discussed this issue with Kirill Budanov during a meeting in Warsaw. According to him, Poland remains a partner of Ukraine in security matters, however, it is awaiting a review of the decision to award one of the subdivisions of the SSO with the honorific name "names of Heroes of the UPA"....
description_uk: 🫠 Польша потребовала от Украины пересмотреть название подразделения ССО в честь УПА Министр обороны Польши Владислав Косиняк-Камыш обсудил этот вопрос с Кириллом Будановым во время встречи в Варшаве. По его словам, Польша остается партнером Украины в вопросах безопасности, однако ожидает пересмотра решения о присвоении одному из подразделений ССО почетного наименования "имени Героев УПА"....
